title: Oreify
description: Mod that adds variants for vanilla ores (granite, andesite, diorite) and few new vanilla-like ores
body:
Oreify expands the underground world of Minecraft with dozens of new vanilla-friendly ores!
Each stone type — granite, diorite, andesite  — now has its own unique ore variants, giving the underground a more natural and varied look.

Discover new blocks like Amber, Sugar Ore and Charcoal Block all blending perfectly with the game’s original art style and balance.
